title: × seleliocereus fulgidus
intro: × Seleliocereus fulgidus, also known as the fulgid spineless cactus, is a rare and unusual cactus hybrid that belongs to the Cactaceae family, characterized by its vibrant yellow flowers and unique spines. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as a natural anti-inflammatory and antiseptic, making it a potential treatment for wounds and skin irritations. Studies have also revealed that the plant has various health benefits, including antioxidant and antiviral properties, which can help protect against cell damage and infections. In traditional herbal medicine, the fulgid spineless cactus can be prepared as a poultice, tea, or infused oil to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
